prompts: Cinematic anime style, Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall. Mira Ledgerfall, an androgynous cadre in a navy cloak, and Ari Emberlane, a feminine scout in a cropped jacket, stand at a polished wooden desk. Mira opens a leather-bound ledger, pointing to a specific entry; Ari leans in closely, observing the caravan rescue logs with an intent expression. Bright, warm lighting, bustling guild background, high-quality anime aesthetic, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous shot, Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall. Ari Emberlane takes a quill from the desk and carefully marks a final entry in Mira Ledgerfall's ledger while Mira holds the book steady. They both share a brief, professional nod of accomplishment, closing the ledger together. Consistent characters, lighting, and camera angle, no text, no watermark.
